plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Summary

**Root Cause:** Classic off-by-one error in `src/utils.ts`, line 7.

The loop condition `i < items.length - 1` stops **one iteration early**, so the last element is never processed.

**The Fix — one change, one file:**

| File | Line | Current (buggy) | Fixed |
|---|---|---|---|
| `src/utils.ts` | 7 | `i < items.length - 1` | `i < items.length` |

**Tests currently failing** (in `tests/utils.test.ts`):
- `"should process all items in the array"` — `["hello","world","foo"]` → missing `"FOO"`
- `"should handle a single item"` — `["test"]` → returns `[]`
- `"should handle two items"` — `["a","b"]` → returns only `["A"]`

After removing `- 1`, all 6 tests (4 `processItems` + 2 `sum`) will pass. No test file changes are needed.
